final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial food photography close-up of a Japanese tonkotsu ramen bowl.

Style/medium: editorial food photography, shallow depth of field, appetizing commercial food styling
Composition: extreme close-up at 45-degree angle, macro lens perspective, focus on noodle lift with chopsticks, creamy broth surface as foreground
Subject: rich opaque tonkotsu pork bone broth, two slices of char siu (braised pork belly), one halved soft-boiled egg with runny yolk, crisp nori sheets, finely sliced green scallions, chopsticks lifting wheat noodles with visible steam wisps
Scene/backdrop: blurred wooden counter or dark restaurant interior, shallow depth isolating the bowl
Lighting/mood: soft diffused key light from upper left, subtle rim light on broth surface, warm and inviting mood suggesting freshness
Color palette: creamy off-white broth as base, warm pink-brown char siu, golden yolk center, deep green scallions, black nori as contrast
Materials/textures: silky collagen-rich broth surface, glistening pork fat, glossy egg white, matte nori, fibrous wheat noodles
Avoid: plastic-looking food, oversaturated colors, harsh flash photography, watermarks, generic stock photo aesthetic
